Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Greenhouse Gas Pollution Pricing Act (qualifying farming fuel)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Greenhouse Gas Pollution Pricing Act (qualifying farming fuel)

Provision.Text: This bill was introduced during the first session of the 43rd Parliament. Pursuant to the Standing Orders of the House of Commons, it is deemed to have been considered and approved at all stages completed at the time of prorogation of the first session. The number of the bill remains unchanged.
This enactment amends the Greenhouse Gas Pollution Pricing Act to extend the exemption for qualifying farming fuel to marketable natural gas and propane.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The definition qualifying farming fuel in section 3 of the Greenhouse Gas Pollution Pricing Act is replaced by the following:

Definition.Text: qualifying farming fuelâ means a type of fuel that is gasoline, light fuel oil, marketable natural gas, propane or a prescribed type of fuel. (combustible agricole admissible)
